plugins.name: 4O3A Antenna Genius
plugins.description: Discover and control 4O3A Antenna Genius antenna switches on the LAN. UDP discovery on port 9007, TCP command channel, automatic reconnect, per-port antenna selection.
plugins.author: Brian Keating (EI6LF)

plugins.name: 4O3A Power Genius XL
plugins.description: 4O3A Power Genius XL solid-state amplifier control. UDP discovery and TCP control on :9008; surfaces operate/standby, A/B band+bias, forward power, SWR, drive, PA current, temperature, and FlexRadio pairing override.
plugins.author: Brian Keating (EI6LF)

plugins.name: 4O3A Tuner Genius XL
plugins.description: 4O3A Tuner Genius XL antenna tuner control. UDP :9010 discovery, TCP :9010 control. One L/C matching network serving up to two radios (SO2R). Live status (forward power, SWR, L/C1/C2, port A/B), tune/bypass/operate controls.
plugins.author: Brian Keating (EI6LF)

plugins.name: RF-Kit RF2K-S Amplifier
plugins.description: Operator console for the RF-Kit RF2K-S amplifier. Forward/reflected power, SWR, tuner status, antenna selection, operate/standby, fault reset, and VNC-injected Tune/Bypass. Talks to the amp's REST API on :8080 and its VNC on :5900.
plugins.author: Brian Keating (EI6LF)

plugins.name: EQ (10-band parametric)
plugins.description: First block of the Zeus voice audio chain v1 (issue #332). Ten-band parametric EQ with per-band frequency, gain, and Q controls plus a draggable transfer-function curve. RBJ Audio EQ Cookbook peaking biquads. Operator presets persist across restart. Realtime managed C#, no native dependency.
plugins.author: KB2UKA

plugins.name: Compressor
plugins.description: Second block of the Zeus voice audio chain v1 (issue #332). VCA-style compressor with threshold, ratio, attack, release, knee, and makeup gain. Brass-plate UI with a live transfer-function curve and vertical IN/OUT/GR meters. Per-block bypass for instant A/B. Realtime managed C#, no native dependency.
plugins.author: KB2UKA

plugins.name: Aural Exciter
plugins.description: Third block of the Zeus voice audio chain v1 (issue #332). Aphex-style aural exciter — a high-pass tap, drive into a tanh saturator to synthesise even harmonics, then mix back over the dry. Operator controls: cutoff frequency, drive, mix. Adds presence and intelligibility for SSB voice without rebalancing the original signal. Realtime managed C#, no native dependency.
plugins.author: KB2UKA

plugins.name: Bass Enhancer
plugins.description: Fourth block of the Zeus voice audio chain v1 (issue #332). MaxxBass / Aphex 204 'Big Bottom' Family-B missing-fundamental approach: low-pass isolates the bass band, full-wave rectification generates octave-up harmonics, a high-pass strips DC + the redundant fundamental, mix back over dry. The ear reconstructs the perceived bass without the radio transmitting frequencies the antenna can't efficiently radiate. Realtime managed C#, no native dependency.
plugins.author: KB2UKA

plugins.name: Reverb
plugins.description: Fifth and final block of the Zeus voice audio chain v1 (issue #332). Classic four-comb / two-allpass Schroeder reverb with per-comb low-pass damping and operator-tunable size, decay, damp, pre-delay, and mix. Tuned for ham-radio TX sweetening — conservative defaults keep the tail behind the voice. Realtime managed C#, no native dependency.
plugins.author: KB2UKA

plugins.name: Noise Gate
plugins.description: Voice noise gate for the Zeus audio chain. Peak-envelope detector with built-in 3 dB open/close hysteresis to prevent chatter, configurable hold time so the gate doesn't clamp shut between syllables, separate attack and release gain-slew time constants, adjustable range (depth of attenuation when closed), and an output gain trim for level-matching downstream blocks. Vertical IN/OUT peak meters and a live threshold rail with OPEN / HOLD / CLOSED state pill. Realtime managed C#, no native dependency.
plugins.author: KB2UKA
